message:
fix: batch sling starts polecat sessions and cleans up on failure (gt-vd6lg)

Four bugs fixed in sling_batch.go:
- Call StartSession() after hook is set (polecats were spawned but never got Claude sessions)
- Clean up orphaned polecats when hook command fails
- Guard against "hooked" status in addition to "pinned" (matching single sling behavior)
- Store dispatcher and no_merge in bead (enables completion notifications and no-merge mode)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
